utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified with detailed descriptions and associated costs. Health coverage details include physical and mental health aspects with cost. Property coverage includes home/contents coverage and cost. Travel coverage includes details and cost. Additional services are listed, though without explicit cost, but it is reasonable to assume they are part of the integrated plan cost. The total_budget specifies monthly and annual costs. Therefore, all 5 items are covered and sufficiently detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes three major insurance components: health_coverage (comprehensive physical and mental health), property_coverage (high-value property insurance up to €50,000), and travel_coverage (comprehensive international travel insurance). The descriptions align with the top-rated premium options in the ground-truth data. For health_coverage, the most fitting match is 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under both physical and mental health, each rated 10. The property_coverage aligns with 'EliteHome Premium Coverage,' rated 10. The travel_coverage matches 'EliteTravel Premium Plan,' rated 10. The additional_services such as 24/7 support, telemedicine, and specialist access correspond to enhancement services like 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 9) and 'Specialist Access' (rating 10).

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Comprehensive physical and mental health insurance with global coverage, including cardiovascular monitoring, respiratory condition management, preventive care, mental health services, and family therapy. Cost: €215/month as part of integrated plan.",
    "property_coverage": "High-value property insurance up to €50,000 covering luxury items, electronics, and business equipment. Cost: €215/month as part of integrated plan.",
    "travel_coverage": "Comprehensive international travel insurance including medical evacuation, business travel protection, and emergency coordination for frequent business travel (80-90 days annually). Cost: €215/month as part of integrated plan.",
    "additional_services": "24/7 customer support, dedicated agent, global assistance, emergency coordination, telemedicine access, immediate specialist access, condition management programs, and 3-10 business day claims processing.",
    "total_budget": "Monthly cost: €215 (down from €950/month). Annual cost: €2,580 (down from €11,400/year). Total annual savings: €8,820. 5% deductible applies to all coverage areas."
